case_title: GERSON ANDINO VS. ESTUARDO AYALA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA E D S PAINTING

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDINO, GERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESTUARDO AYALA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA E D S PAINTING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDINO, GERSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESTUARDO AYALA, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA E D S PAINTING $6,083.16 PRINCIPAL, $21.97 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,330.13, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $150.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,523.87 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDINO, GERSON
